title: nephrodium incanum
intro: Nephrodium incanum, also known as the Incense Fern, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium incanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Nephrodium incanum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
